security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https: asset: http://asset.localhost https://asset.localhost; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https: asset: http://asset.localhost https://asset.localhost; font-src 'self' data: asset: http://asset.localhost https://asset.localhost; frame-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost https://asset.localhost blob:

bundle.longDescription: Portico is a local-first desktop agent workbench for automating software engineering tasks across your codebase, terminal, browser, and desktop.
